description: BLS/aggregate signature schemes that omit domain separation (e.g., chain id, contract, purpose) allow signature replay across domains. A valid signature for one network or message type can be reused elsewhere to authorize unintended actions.
name: Missing Domain Separation in Aggregate Signatures
remediation: - Include explicit domain separation tags in the signed message for every aggregate signature. - Verify domains on-chain and reject signatures from unknown domains. - Use well-reviewed libraries and EIP-712 style typed data for aggregate schemes.
